heading: Definition of intellectual property rights
label: 4341 Definition of intellectual property rights
text: In this subchapter, the term “intellectual property rights” refers to copyrights, trademarks, and other forms of intellectual property rights that are enforced by U.S. Customs and Border Protection or U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title III of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title III to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 114–125130 Stat. 149Feb. 24, 2016
